bead.title: Implement axon Backend for bead tracker
bead.description: Implement the axon-backed Backend (per ddx-6bb51a52 TD and ddx-bbdd7564 interface). Cover claim semantics, atomic writes, events append, archive policy, and JSONL export/import for bd/br round-trip. Selectable via the backend config knob. Behind a feature flag until ddx-3ec0chaos signs off.
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/internal/bead/axon_backend.go implements the Backend interface. 2. All ops (create/show/update/close, dep add/remove/tree, list/ready/blocked, claim, events append, archive split, import/export) covered by unit tests. 3. Selectable via beads.backend=axon. 4. go test ./cli/... passes with backend=axon for the new unit tests.
